title: Kinematic timing transmission — phase and thermal study
summary: Investigate phase accuracy, backlash sensitivity, thermal growth, manufacturability.
system_purpose: Define analysis scope and deliverables for a timing drive subsystem.

included: thermal expansion effects on center distance

engineering_objectives.statement: Quantify phase error vs temperature and tension.

assumptions: Lumped thermal model acceptable for first pass.
constraints: Must not exceed OEM envelope for center distance adjustment.
forbidden_actions: No deletion of safety-critical tests without human approval.

required_deliverables.description: Parameterized kinematic model inputs for solver

acceptance_tests.description: Phase error budget documented with sources
